creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 148291
switch port to GitHub

As http://stosberg.net/odt2txt/ is redirecting to the GitHub page and ftp.renatasystems.org was not reachable for me, a build failed here. Sadly, the author doesn't use tags in his GH repository, so I just took the lastest commit, which is 0.4 plus some minor fixes.
